name: Tomen Devices Corporation
summary: Tomen Devices Corporation operates as an electronics trading company in Japan. The company sells semiconductors products and electronic components. Its products include memory semiconductors, including DRAM, FLASH, and MCP; system LSI semiconductors, including ASIC, DDI, and CMOS image sensors; and liquid crystal panels, LEDs, and OLEDs. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
